code_dossier.name: OSSMultiUploadFileRequest.java
code_dossier.description: OSS multipart upload request DTO that extends OSSUploadFileRequest to support large file uploads with configurable part size and retry mechanism

data.detailed_description:
OSSMultiUploadFileRequest is a Data Transfer Object (DTO) designed for handling multipart file upload requests to Object Storage Service (OSS). This class extends OSSUploadFileRequest to inherit base file upload properties while adding specific configuration for multipart upload scenarios.

The class introduces two key fields:
1. `partSize` (long): Specifies the size of each file part during multipart upload, measured in bytes. This allows large files to be split into manageable chunks for efficient transmission.
2. `maxRetry` (int): Defines the maximum number of retry attempts when a part upload fails, providing fault tolerance for network instability.

The class leverages Lombok annotations (@Data, @EqualsAndHashCode) to automatically generate boilerplate code including getters, setters, equals(), hashCode(), and toString() methods. The @EqualsAndHashCode(callSuper = true) annotation ensures parent class fields are included in equality comparisons.

This DTO is positioned in the third-party API module, indicating it serves as a contract for external service integration, specifically for OSS multipart upload operations which are essential for handling large file transfers in distributed systems.
responsibilities: Define request parameters for OSS multipart file upload operations
Encapsulate part size configuration for chunked file transmission
Provide retry configuration for fault-tolerant upload handling
Extend base upload request with multipart-specific attributes
Serve as data contract between client and OSS upload service

interfaces.name: OSSMultiUploadFileRequest

interfaces.description: Sets the maximum retry count for upload failures
